home.hero_badge: AI agents active — monitoring your restaurant right now
home.hero_sub: Four specialized AI agents — fully automated to run your restaurant's delivery, menu, social, and customer ops. Manage everything from WhatsApp or Slack, right from your phone.
home.agents_desc: Each agent has a dedicated role and a clear set of services it delivers — every day, without needing direction from you.

home.services_desc: Every plan gives your agents the tools to execute across the channels that drive restaurant growth.
home.svc_delivery_desc: AI manages your ad bids, budget allocation, and platform promotion mix across Uber Eats and DoorDash — maximizing every dollar of delivery spend.

home.svc_social_desc: AI generates and schedules your weekly content calendar, tracks what's working, surfaces your best posts, and continuously refines your posting strategy.
home.svc_influencer_desc: AI identifies and shortlists local food creators and KOLs, manages outreach, and coordinates collaboration campaigns proven to drive attributable orders.
home.svc_reviews_desc: AI monitors every review across Google, Yelp, and delivery platforms — drafting responses, flagging complaints, and protecting your public rating around the clock.
home.svc_loyalty_desc: AI identifies lapsed customers, segments them by value, designs targeted win-back campaigns, and tracks repeat purchase rates to grow lifetime revenue.

about.hero_p1: Restaurant growth requires consistent effort across delivery performance, menu quality, social content, guest reputation, and repeat purchase. No single tactic moves the needle for long — and most restaurant teams can't run all of it well at the same time.
about.hero_p2: Favie deploys specialized AI agents to own each growth function — fully automated, running 24/7, surfacing insights and executing improvements without you having to manage the process yourself. And you can direct your entire team from WhatsApp or Slack, right from your phone.
about.four_agents_p1: Most restaurant marketing looks like a series of disconnected activities — a social post here, an ad there, a promotion when things slow down. The result is inconsistent performance that's difficult to measure and harder to improve.
about.four_agents_p2: Favie works differently. Each AI agent has a specific job: one owns delivery and revenue, one owns menu and conversion, one owns content and reach, one owns reputation and retention. They each work fully autonomously within their domain — and they share context with each other inside one operating system.
about.four_agents_p3: The value isn't just what each agent does individually. It's the coordination and full automation. Agents run 24/7 — and you manage, review, and approve their work directly from WhatsApp, Slack, or any messaging app you already use.
about.card_four_agents_desc: Each agent owns a specific growth function — and is built specifically for how restaurants grow.
about.card_whatsapp_desc: Manage your entire AI team from WhatsApp, Slack, or any messaging app — no dashboard needed.
about.agent_team_desc: Specialization matters. A single generalist can't monitor delivery analytics, rewrite menu copy, draft review responses, and schedule social content at the same time. Dedicated agents can — simultaneously.
about.adv_monitoring_desc: AI agents track your delivery metrics, reviews, and content performance continuously — surfacing issues before they become expensive.
about.adv_faster_desc: Recommendations are generated as data comes in, not at your next monthly check-in. You act before the window closes.
about.adv_coordinated_desc: All four agents operate inside one system with shared context. What the Chef Agent learns, the Operation Agent can use. What the Social Agent tracks, the Customer Agent references.
about.adv_less_execution_desc: You review insights, approve direction, and set priorities. The agents handle execution, follow-up, monitoring, and reporting.
about.why_system_sub: Real growth requires delivery, menu, content, reputation, and retention working together. When they don't, every channel underperforms — no matter how well it's managed individually.
about.why_system_1: Running delivery ads without improving menu quality limits how far ROAS can go
about.why_system_2: Growing social reach without reputation management leaks guests at the review stage
about.why_system_3: Acquiring new customers without retention infrastructure loses them after the first order
about.why_system_4: Managing each channel separately creates blind spots that compound into stalled growth
about.why_system_5: Disconnected tools and agencies require you to coordinate — the system does it for you
about.why_system_6: Consistent reporting across all growth functions is impossible without a shared operating model
about.cta_desc: Book a 30-minute consultation. We'll walk through your current growth gaps and show you exactly which agents would move the needle first.

contact.hero_sub: Fill out the form below and we'll respond within one business day. We'll come to the conversation prepared — with context about your restaurant and a clear agenda for the call.

contact.next_step_1: We'll review your submission and research your restaurant before responding.
contact.next_step_2: You'll receive a response within one business day to schedule a consultation call.
contact.next_step_3: On the call, we'll review your current situation and identify the highest-leverage opportunities.
contact.next_step_4: If there's a fit, we'll put together a scoped proposal for your review.

faq.hero_sub: Common questions from restaurant operators considering a growth engagement. Don't see your question? Book a consultation and ask us directly.
faq.working_q1: How do you typically work with a new restaurant client?
faq.working_a1: Every engagement starts with an audit. We review your current delivery platform performance, social presence, content, reputation, and any available guest data. From there, we build a prioritized growth plan and agree on scope, KPIs, and timelines before starting execution.
faq.working_q2: Do you work with single-location restaurants or only multi-location brands?
faq.working_a2: Both. We work with independent single-location operators, growing multi-location brands, fast casual concepts, and restaurant groups managing multiple brands. The scope and service mix looks different at each stage — but the execution approach is the same.
faq.working_a3: Onboarding typically takes two weeks. We collect access to your platforms, conduct the performance audit, establish baselines, and finalize the strategy and KPI framework for your engagement. Execution begins in week three.
faq.working_q4: How much of our time does this require?
faq.working_a4: After onboarding, most clients spend two to four hours per month with us — primarily for content approvals, monthly reporting reviews, and strategic check-ins. We handle the execution.
faq.services_q1: Do I need to take all 6 services, or can I start with one?
faq.services_a1: You can start with a single service line. Many clients begin with delivery optimization or social media operation and expand as they see results. We'll recommend a scope during your consultation based on where we see the highest leverage for your specific situation.
faq.services_q2: What delivery platforms do you support?
faq.services_a2: Our primary focus is DoorDash and Uber Eats, which together represent the majority of third-party delivery volume for most restaurants. We also work with Grubhub and platform-specific strategies where relevant to your market.
faq.services_q3: Do you produce the actual content, or just provide strategy?
faq.services_a3: We produce the work. For social media operation, we write captions, direct content, schedule posts, and produce short-form video scripts, shot lists, and full production direction. We are an execution partner, not a strategy consultant.
faq.services_q4: What do you need from us to manage our delivery optimization?
faq.services_a4: We need advertiser access to your DoorDash and Uber Eats accounts, your current menu, and a clear understanding of your margins and promotional capacity. We handle campaign setup, management, and optimization from there.
faq.performance_q1: How long before we see results?
faq.performance_a1: It depends on the service line. Delivery platform improvements are typically visible within four to six weeks. Social media growth takes consistent execution over three to six months. Reputation scores improve over two to four months of systematic management. We set honest expectations at the outset of every engagement.
faq.performance_q2: How do you report on performance?
faq.performance_a2: We deliver a monthly performance report for every active service line. The report covers the metrics we agreed to track, month-over-month trends, what changed, and what we're doing about it. Reports are sent digitally and reviewed in a monthly call.
faq.performance_q3: What if the results aren't what we expected?
faq.performance_a3: We have a frank conversation about it. We'll assess what's driving the gap — whether that's market factors, execution issues, or misaligned expectations — and propose a clear plan for what changes. We don't hide from underperformance.
faq.contracts_a1: We offer monthly retainers for ongoing service lines and project-based engagements for specific initiatives like menu restructures or reputation audits. Pricing is scoped to the services engaged and discussed during your consultation.
faq.contracts_a2: Our standard retainer engagements have a three-month minimum — enough time to implement, optimize, and produce meaningful results. After the initial term, engagements continue month-to-month with 30-day notice to adjust scope or end the engagement.
faq.contracts_q3: What makes you different from a general marketing agency?
faq.contracts_a3: We specialize exclusively in restaurant growth. Our service lines are built around the specific channels and levers that drive revenue for restaurants — delivery platforms, social media, creator collaborations, reputation, and retention. We don't try to do everything for every industry. That focus makes us more effective for restaurant operators.
faq.cta_sub: Book a consultation. We'll answer your questions, assess your situation, and give you an honest view of how we can help.

industries.hero_sub: Whether you're an independent operator or a multi-brand group, Favie adapts to your format, stage, and growth goals.
industries.seg_independent_subtitle: Single-location operators who need professional marketing without the overhead.
industries.seg_independent_help: Access the same growth infrastructure as larger brands — delivery ads, social content, reputation, and retention — at a scale that fits you.
industries.seg_multi_subtitle: Growing concepts that need consistent brand and performance across every storefront.
industries.seg_multi_help: Coordinated delivery management, market-specific content, and location-level performance reporting — all in one place.
industries.seg_fastcasual_subtitle: High-volume formats where delivery economics and repeat purchase drive profitability.
industries.seg_fastcasual_help: Improve delivery ad efficiency, structure menus for higher AOV, and run retention campaigns that bring guests back faster.
industries.seg_launch_subtitle: Concepts entering the market who need visibility, trial, and reputation from day one.
industries.seg_launch_help: Optimised delivery storefronts, content strategy, review generation, and creator campaigns that drive early awareness and first orders.
industries.seg_delivery_subtitle: Restaurants where delivery is a primary revenue channel that needs dedicated management.
industries.seg_delivery_help: We own the delivery channel for you — paid ads, storefront optimisation, menu restructuring, and reputation management.
industries.seg_groups_subtitle: Portfolio operators who need scalable marketing execution across multiple brands.
industries.seg_groups_help: Coordinated delivery management, concept-specific content strategies, and consolidated reporting across your entire portfolio.
industries.adapt_format_desc: Fast casual, sit-down, delivery-only — we adapt to your service model.
industries.adapt_stage_desc: New launch or established brand — the playbook fits where you are now.
industries.adapt_channel_desc: Delivery-heavy, social-first, or both — we prioritise what drives results.
industries.adapt_scale_desc: Single location or multi-brand portfolio — execution scales with you.
industries.cta_sub: We work with restaurant businesses across formats and stages. Book a call and we'll show you how we'd approach your situation.

results_page.hero_sub: We define specific outcomes for every service line and report on them honestly — no vanity metrics, no spin.
results_page.metric_delivery_desc: Platform search ranking, ad spend efficiency, and order volume from delivery channels.
results_page.metric_revenue_desc: Average order value, bundle attachment rates, and high-margin item discovery.
results_page.metric_social_desc: Reach and follower growth, engagement rates, and content-driven traffic.
results_page.metric_reputation_desc: Star rating trends, review volume growth, and response time across all platforms.
results_page.metric_creator_desc: Earned impressions, campaign engagement, and attributable traffic from collaborations.
results_page.metric_retention_desc: Guest reactivation rates, repeat purchase frequency, and lifetime value growth.
results_page.method_audit_desc: We establish an honest performance baseline before any execution starts — so every result is measurable against where you actually began.
results_page.method_kpis_desc: For every service line, we agree upfront on which metrics we're moving, in what direction, and over what timeframe.
results_page.method_reporting_desc: A clear performance report every month — every active service line, no spin, no omissions.
results_page.method_optimization_desc: We use data to make specific, documented decisions each month. Growth compounds when optimization is systematic.
results_page.timeline_sub: Growth compounds over time. Here's a realistic view of how results build across the first 90 days.
results_page.cta_sub: Book a consultation and we'll walk through the metrics that matter most for your restaurant.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Everything your AI team has done, flagged, or queued for your review.
activity.a1_title: 3 short-form video drafts are ready for your approval
activity.a1_detail: Clips 03, 04, and 05 were generated for Instagram Reels and TikTok. All three follow the sizzle-and-reveal format that outperformed your account average by 2x last week.
activity.a2_title: Delivery ad budget recommendation flagged for review
activity.a2_detail: Current monthly cap of $1,300 is generating wasted spend in the 2:30–5 PM low-conversion window. AI recommends reducing to $700 to preserve peak-hour coverage while eliminating afternoon waste.
activity.a3_title: Menu upsell prompts updated on Uber Eats and DoorDash
activity.a3_detail: Checkout prompts for Milk Tea add-on and Spring Roll upgrade were enabled on both platforms. Based on current order volume, projected to add $0.81 to average order value.
activity.a4_title: Monthly reputation report published — 48 reviews, 4.6 ★ avg
activity.a4_detail: Customer Service Agent compiled reviews across Google, Yelp, Uber Eats, and DoorDash. 41 positive, 5 neutral, 2 negative (both flagged for follow-up). DoorDash rating dipped to 4.3★ — escalation in progress.
activity.a5_title: Ad spend rebalanced — more budget shifted to Uber Eats lunch window
activity.a5_detail: Uber Eats 12–2 PM bid increased by 25%. DoorDash afternoon bids reduced by 60%. Rebalancing based on ROAS analysis: Uber Eats lunch hour averaging 5.1x vs DoorDash afternoon at 1.2x.
activity.a6_title: Creator shortlist prepared — 5 candidates ready for approval
activity.a6_detail: Social Media Agent identified 5 Downtown micro-influencers specializing in food content. Combined estimated reach: 193k. Campaign budget needed: $400–$600 per campaign. Past creator ROI: 3.8x.
activity.a7_title: Win-back segment refreshed — 398 lapsed customers identified
activity.a7_detail: Customer Service Agent identified 398 customers with no orders in 45+ days. Segmented into 3 tiers by order value. Tiered reactivation campaign drafted and awaiting deployment approval.
activity.a8_title: Menu photo audit completed — 3 items flagged for refresh
activity.a8_detail: Chef Agent reviewed all 24 active menu items for photo quality. Steamed Fish Fillet, Hot & Sour Soup, and Mango Milk Tea were rated below standard. New photo briefs have been generated for each.
activity.a8_chip0: Steamed Fish Fillet — too dark, no garnish
activity.a8_chip1: Hot & Sour Soup — no texture visible
activity.a8_chip2: Mango Milk Tea — no branded photo
activity.a9_title: 4 new dish ideas generated based on trending food content
activity.a9_detail: Chef Agent analyzed TikTok food trends, seasonal demand, and local competitor gaps. Four dish concepts are ready for kitchen evaluation: Mango Chicken Rice Bowl, Spicy Garlic Wings, Cold Sesame Noodle Bowl, and Crispy Tofu Bento.
activity.a10_title: Weekly content calendar published — 12 posts scheduled
activity.a10_detail: Social Media Agent scheduled 12 posts across Instagram and TikTok for the week. Mix of Reels (5), Stories (5), and static posts (2). Top anticipated post: Kung Pao Chicken sizzle reel — Tuesday 12:30 PM.
activity.a11_title: BOGO Spring Roll promotion launched on Uber Eats
activity.a11_detail: BOGO Spring Roll Set promotion is live on Uber Eats. Promotion runs through end of month. Early performance: +34 incremental orders in 48 hours, well above the 20-order breakeven threshold.
activity.a12_title: Repeat-order lunch campaign sent to 312 past customers
activity.a12_detail: Customer Service Agent deployed a targeted SMS campaign to past customers who ordered lunch items. 11.3% click-through rate — above the 8% benchmark. 43 re-orders attributed to this campaign.
activity.a13_title: 2 negative DoorDash reviews responded to within 2 hours
activity.a13_detail: Customer Service Agent detected two 1-star reviews on DoorDash citing long delivery wait times. Personalized responses were posted and recovery offers (10% off next order) were sent to both customers within 2 hours.

agents_page.task_termination_checklist_short: Every CA legal step for offboarding — final pay, COBRA, notices, and property return.
agents_page.task_onboarding_schedule_short: Two-week day-by-day training plan with tasks, trainers, and learning goals.
agents_page.task_lease_negotiation_short: Market-data-backed negotiation strategy with talking points and attorney checklist.
agents_page.chat_error_fallback: Sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.
agents_page.op_desc: Monitors overall revenue and order growth, delivery ad spend efficiency, platform performance, and recommends budget and promotion adjustments.
agents_page.op_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Operation Agent. I track your revenue, delivery platform performance, and ad spend efficiency every day — flagging anything that needs attention before it costs you money. When you need a specific analysis or plan, I can generate it on demand in seconds. Subscribe to run all tasks unlimited, or pick a single task below.
agents_page.op_chip1: How are we growing this week?
agents_page.op_chip1_resp: Week 4 was your strongest week this month — 91 orders, $2,030 revenue, all-time high. Driving factors: Uber Eats lunch-hour performance improved after my bid adjustment last Monday, and the combo promotion added 61 incremental orders.
agents_page.op_chip2: Should we increase our delivery budget?
agents_page.op_chip2_resp: No — I recommend the opposite. Your current $1,300 cap is above the efficient range. Reducing to $700 will eliminate afternoon waste while preserving your peak-hour coverage. Here's the full breakdown.
agents_page.op_chip3_resp: Uber Eats is leading across every metric — higher ROAS, better conversion, stronger rating, and growing order volume. DoorDash has a 7.5% order dip I'm actively working to recover.
agents_page.op_chip4: What promotions should we run next?
agents_page.op_chip4_resp: Recommendation for next 30 days: (1) Extend the combo deal — it's your highest ROI promo. (2) Test a BOGO spring roll on DoorDash to recover algorithm visibility. (3) Reactivate the 15% lunch discount on Uber Eats only — better platform for that format.
agents_page.op_chip5_resp: Biggest efficiency loss: $234/month in afternoon delivery ad spend with 1.2–1.4x ROAS (below breakeven at your CPO). Second: DoorDash spend efficiency dropping — CPO increased from $1.72 to $1.98 over 3 weeks. I've already begun rebalancing.
agents_page.op_proactive1_label: Tracks revenue and delivery metrics daily
agents_page.op_proactive1_desc: Monitors order volume, ROAS, and platform performance — flags any metric that drops outside your healthy range
agents_page.op_proactive2_label: Optimizes ad spend in real time
agents_page.op_proactive2_desc: Adjusts your delivery ad budget based on hourly conversion patterns — cuts waste during low-traffic windows automatically
agents_page.op_proactive3_desc: Monitors every active promotion's ROI and flags when ROAS drops below your breakeven threshold
agents_page.op_ondemand1_desc: Revenue breakdowns, ROAS comparisons, platform benchmarks — generated on demand with your exact data
agents_page.op_ondemand2_desc: Budget reallocation plans, promotion mixes, and competitor positioning — ready in seconds, updated monthly
agents_page.chef_desc: Recommends new dish ideas based on trends and seasonal timing, and optimizes existing menu photos and descriptions to improve click-through and order conversion.
agents_page.chef_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Chef Agent. I track food trends matched to your cuisine, audit your menu photos against conversion benchmarks, and monitor which dishes are gaining or losing momentum each week. When you need a dish ideas report, photo review, or description rewrite, I'll have it ready in seconds. Subscribe to run all tasks unlimited, or pick a single task below.
agents_page.chef_chip1: What new dishes should we try next?
agents_page.chef_chip1_resp: Here are my top 4 new dish recommendations for this month — all based on food trend data, your existing prep capability, and local demand signals in your delivery zone.
agents_page.chef_chip2_resp: I've rated all 24 menu items for photo quality. Three items are below acceptable standard and likely costing you orders. Here's the full audit.
agents_page.chef_chip3: How should we improve this item description?
agents_page.chef_chip3_resp: Here are three high-priority item description upgrades. The before/after comparison shows how sensory language and specificity improve ordering confidence on delivery platforms.
agents_page.chef_chip4: What seasonal items fit our brand right now?
agents_page.chef_chip4_resp: For June–August, I recommend: (1) Mango Chicken Rice Bowl — leverages summer fruit trend + your existing protein. (2) Cold Sesame Noodle Bowl — cool weather alternative, highly searchable. (3) Iced Mango Milk Tea — your best beverage upgrade opportunity.
agents_page.chef_chip5: Which dishes should become hero products?
agents_page.chef_chip5_resp: Hero product recommendation: Kung Pao Chicken (already strong), plus I'd elevate Spicy Garlic Wings as a second hero once you add it. Hero products get prioritized in your delivery platform storefront, Instagram pinned posts, and paid ad imagery.
agents_page.chef_proactive1_label: Tracks food trends matching your cuisine
agents_page.chef_proactive1_desc: Monitors TikTok, Instagram, and delivery search trends for dishes relevant to your menu style — sends you weekly signals
agents_page.chef_proactive2_desc: Scans all active menu item photos against conversion benchmarks — flags items where a photo update would improve orders
agents_page.chef_proactive3_desc: Tracks order volume and review sentiment per dish — surfaces items gaining or losing momentum each week
agents_page.chef_ondemand1_desc: Dish idea reports, seasonal menus, and SEO-optimized item descriptions — matched to your cuisine style and prep capability
agents_page.chef_ondemand2_desc: Specific styling and reshooting instructions per item, benchmarked against top performers in your category
agents_page.social_desc: Manages your posting activity, tracks content performance and audience engagement, recommends upcoming content, and matches you with relevant creator collaborations.
agents_page.social_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Marketing Agent. I monitor your content performance across Instagram and TikTok daily, track what your audience engages with, and keep your creator pipeline ready to activate. When you need a content calendar, Reels script, or campaign report, I'll have it done in seconds. Subscribe to run all tasks unlimited, or pick a single task below.
agents_page.social_chip1: What content performed best this week?
agents_page.social_chip1_resp: The Kung Pao Chicken sizzle reel on Tuesday was your top performer — 4,200 views, 312 saves, 6 attributed delivery orders. Format insight: behind-the-scenes + food-in-motion content consistently outperforms static posts 6x.
agents_page.social_chip2_resp: Next 7 days: Monday — 'Rice or Noodles?' audience poll (drives comments). Wednesday — Combo deal announcement Reel (30s with sizzle close). Friday — Flash delivery offer Story. Sunday — Customer reaction compilation (builds trust). I've drafted all four.
agents_page.social_chip3_resp: Audience data shows food visuals, plating close-ups, and steam/sizzle effects drive your highest save and share rates. Price-value sentiment is positive — your audience responds well to portion-size messaging.
agents_page.social_chip4: Which creators should we work with?
agents_page.social_chip4_resp: 5 creators are shortlisted and ready to contact. I recommend starting with @downtownfoodiejen and @eatlocalmike — both are Downtown-based, have food-specialist audiences, and are within budget. Combined estimated reach: 70k.
agents_page.social_chip5_resp: Q3 content calendar highlights: June — summer heat wave theme + iced beverages. July — new dish reveal (Mango Chicken Bowl) + creator campaign launch. August — back-to-school family meal deals + Google Business push. I can generate the full 12-week calendar.
agents_page.social_proactive1_desc: Monitors reach, engagement, saves, and follower growth across Instagram and TikTok — surfaces what's working each week
agents_page.social_proactive2_desc: Watches food trends, seasonal moments, and local events — alerts you before the peak so you can publish ahead of the curve
agents_page.social_proactive3_desc: Tracks shortlisted KOL/KOC partnerships, past campaign ROI, and upcoming collaboration opportunities
agents_page.social_ondemand1_desc: Reels scripts, post captions, hashtag sets, influencer briefs, and 30-day content calendars — written to match your brand voice
agents_page.social_ondemand2_desc: Post-campaign analytics summaries, audience growth breakdowns, and next-quarter content strategy — on demand
agents_page.customer_desc: Monitors Google, Yelp, and delivery platform ratings, tracks complaint resolution, and recommends win-back and retention campaigns to grow repeat revenue.
agents_page.customer_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Customer Service Agent. I watch your reviews across Google, Yelp, Uber Eats, and DoorDash around the clock — alerting you the moment a new negative review lands. I also track complaint patterns and help you win back lapsed customers. Subscribe to run all tasks unlimited, or pick a single task below.
agents_page.customer_chip1: What are customers complaining about most?
agents_page.customer_chip1_resp: Top complaint this month: delivery wait time on DoorDash (2 mentions). Root cause: average DoorDash delivery time has crept to 31 minutes — above the 30-minute threshold that triggers DoorDash visibility penalties. I've escalated and flagged to operations.
agents_page.customer_chip2: How are our Google and Yelp ratings changing?
agents_page.customer_chip2_resp: Google: 4.7★ (+0.1 vs last month, 28 new reviews). Yelp: 4.4★ (stable, 14 new reviews). Google is trending positively — I've been proactively asking satisfied customers for Google reviews via post-delivery follow-up.
agents_page.customer_chip3: What delivery issues still need follow-up?
agents_page.customer_chip3_resp: Two open items: (1) DoorDash wait time escalation — support ticket open, awaiting response. (2) Missing dipping sauce pattern (3 reports this month) — added to kitchen checklist, monitoring for repeat occurrence.
agents_page.customer_chip4: What should we do to improve reviews?
agents_page.customer_chip4_resp: Three highest-ROI review improvements: (1) Reduce DoorDash delivery time under 30 min — will stop rating erosion. (2) Add post-delivery Google review prompt for orders rated 5★ in-app — projects to double monthly Google review volume. (3) Add 'Thank you for your order' card in packaging with QR code.
agents_page.customer_chip5: What win-back campaign should we run next?
agents_page.customer_chip5_resp: I recommend launching the tiered win-back campaign targeting 398 inactive customers. High-value tier (142 customers) gets free delivery + 10% off — projected $3,100 recovery. Ready to deploy Tuesday.
agents_page.customer_proactive1_label: Monitors all platform reviews in real time
agents_page.customer_proactive1_desc: Tracks Google, Yelp, Uber Eats, and DoorDash reviews — sends an alert the moment a new negative review appears
agents_page.customer_proactive2_desc: Detects when the same issue appears multiple times across platforms — surfaces root cause and response recommendations
agents_page.customer_proactive3_desc: Updates your platform ratings and response rate in real time so you always know exactly where you stand
agents_page.customer_ondemand1_desc: Professional, brand-consistent responses to negative reviews — personalized to the specific issue, ready to post
agents_page.customer_ondemand2_desc: Win-back sequences for lapsed customers, loyalty program blueprints, and post-visit follow-up templates
agents_page.finance_desc: Monitors food cost, labor cost, and overall profitability. Identifies margin leaks, flags overspending, and recommends pricing and cost-reduction actions.
agents_page.finance_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Finance Agent. I monitor your food cost, labor cost, and net margin daily — alerting you the moment any cost category drifts outside your target range. When you need a P&L breakdown, food cost analysis, or cash flow forecast, I'll generate it with your exact data in seconds. Subscribe to run all tasks unlimited, or pick a single task below.
agents_page.finance_chip1: What is our food cost ratio this month?
agents_page.finance_chip1_resp: Food cost ratio: 31.2% — within the 28–33% healthy range for your cuisine type. The main cost driver this month is protein costs (chicken +6%, beef +4% from your supplier). I recommend locking in a 90-day price agreement with your poultry supplier before summer demand peaks.
agents_page.finance_chip2_resp: Top margin leaks: (1) Steamed Fish Fillet — 29% margin, underpriced by ~$1.50. (2) Weekend overtime — adds $380/month in avoidable labor cost. (3) DoorDash platform fee (30%) is 4 points higher than Uber Eats — recommend shifting promotions to Uber Eats to improve net margin.
agents_page.finance_chip3: What is our net profit this month?
agents_page.finance_chip3_resp: Net profit: $4,920 (17.3% net margin) — up from $4,210 last month (+16.9%). Breakdown: Revenue $28,460 → Food Cost $8,880 → Labor $8,082 → Platform Fees $4,270 → Overhead $2,308 = Net $4,920. This is your best month in the last 6 months.
agents_page.finance_chip4: Which menu items should we reprice?
agents_page.finance_chip4_resp: Repricing recommendations: (1) Steamed Fish Fillet: $16.00 → $17.50 (+$1.50, brings margin from 29% to 36%). (2) Hot & Sour Soup: $8.50 → $9.50 (+$1.00, margin improvement of 7 points). These two changes add ~$480/month in margin at current volume.
agents_page.finance_chip5: How can we reduce labor cost?
agents_page.finance_chip5_resp: Two specific adjustments to bring labor from 28.4% to under 27%: (1) Shift one weekend kitchen staff from 8-hour to 6-hour Saturday shift — saves $210/month. (2) Overlap lunch and dinner prep to reduce 2 hours of double-staffing — saves $170/month. Combined: $380/month saving.
agents_page.finance_proactive1_desc: Tracks food cost %, labor cost %, and net margin — alerts you the moment any cost category exceeds your target
agents_page.finance_proactive2_label: Flags budget overruns before they compound
agents_page.finance_proactive2_desc: Detects overtime spend, platform fee creep, and food cost spikes week by week — alerts you before the month closes
agents_page.finance_proactive3_desc: Updates your profitability snapshot in real time across all revenue channels — no waiting for your accountant
agents_page.finance_ondemand1_desc: P&L breakdowns, food cost analyses, cash flow projections, and tax prep checklists — generated with your exact data
agents_page.finance_ondemand2_desc: Menu pricing formulas, margin improvement plans, and supplier cost reviews — ready whenever you need to make a pricing decision
agents_page.legal_desc: Monitors California labor law compliance, handles employee documentation, and flags HR risks before they become legal liabilities.
agents_page.legal_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Legal & HR Agent. I work in the background every day without you having to ask — monitoring CA labor law changes, scanning for compliance gaps in your schedule, and keeping your HR risk dashboard up to date. When something needs your attention, I'll alert you before it becomes a problem. And whenever you need a document — a warning letter, a job posting, an onboarding plan — just ask and it's ready in seconds. Subscribe once and run any of the 6 tasks below as many times as you need, no extra charge.
agents_page.legal_chip1: What California labor laws apply to my restaurant?
agents_page.legal_chip3: How do I legally terminate an employee?
agents_page.legal_chip4: What are the meal and rest break rules?
agents_page.legal_chip5: Help me write a job posting
agents_page.legal_proactive1_desc: Watches CA minimum wage, break rules, and overtime thresholds — sends an alert the moment something changes
agents_page.legal_proactive2_desc: Scans your schedule and payroll data weekly, surfaces any I-9 gaps, break violations, or overdue certifications before they become liabilities
agents_page.legal_proactive3_desc: Updates your open HR risks in real time so you always know exactly where you stand, without asking
agents_page.legal_ondemand1_desc: Handbooks, warning letters, job descriptions, offer letters, termination checklists — generated in seconds, ready to sign
agents_page.legal_ondemand2_desc: Step-by-step process for hiring, disciplining, and offboarding — legally correct every time, as many times as you need
agents_page.expert_role: Meet any user need without restrictions
agents_page.expert_desc: Your unrestricted restaurant expert. Ask anything — strategy, operations, recipes, growth, compliance, marketing, or anything else.
agents_page.expert_init_msg: Hi, I'm your Restaurant Expert. Ask me anything — no restrictions, no topic limits. Strategy, menu, operations, staff, marketing, finance, compliance — whatever you need.

task_market.page_subtitle: Run a task — get a tailored AI report in ~30 seconds
task_market.fill_and_run: Fill in the form and click Run
task_market.opt_deposit_forfeited: $25 deposit forfeited if cancelled less than 24 hrs
task_market.opt_cc_required: Credit card required, charged for no-shows
task_market.field_has_tipped_workers: Do you have tipped workers? (servers, bartenders, etc.)
task_market.ph_job_title: e.g. Line Cook, Server, Shift Manager
task_market.ph_responsibilities: e.g. Prepare dishes according to recipes, maintain station cleanliness, assist with inventory...
task_market.field_violation: Describe the violation or performance issue
task_market.ph_violation: e.g. Employee was 30 minutes late without notice on three separate occasions in the past month...
task_market.ph_position: e.g. Server, Prep Cook, Shift Lead
task_market.field_avg_check_after_tax: Average check per guest (after tax, before tip)
task_market.ph_menu_details: e.g. Tri-tip carving station, Caesar salad, roasted vegetables, rolls, dessert bar
task_market.ph_increase_amount: e.g. 8% across the menu, or $1–2 per item
task_market.ph_dish_name: e.g. Grilled Salmon with Lemon Butter
task_market.ph_ingredients:
Salmon fillet, 6 oz, $1.80/oz
Butter, 1 tbsp, $0.08
Lemon, ¼, $0.15
Asparagus, 3 oz, $0.50/oz
...
task_market.desc_ingredients: Format: Ingredient, quantity, cost. Include every component including sides and garnishes.
task_market.field_menu_text: Your menu (dish name + price, one per line)
task_market.ph_menu_text:
Margherita Pizza $18
Grilled Salmon $32
Caesar Salad $14
...
task_market.desc_menu_text: Include all items you want analyzed. Format: Item Name $Price
task_market.ph_review_text: The food was cold and our server forgot our drinks twice...
task_market.ph_restaurant_type: e.g. Japanese ramen, upscale Italian, fast-casual Mexican
task_market.ph_complaint_text: We waited 45 minutes for our food with no update from the server. The pasta was overcooked when it finally arrived...
task_market.ph_our_side: We were short-staffed that night due to a last-minute call-out. The kitchen was backed up by about 20 minutes...
task_market.field_max_party_size: Maximum party size you can accommodate
task_market.ph_max_party_size: e.g. 10 for reservations, up to 50 with private room
task_market.field_reward_budget: Reward budget / discount you're willing to give
task_market.ph_reward_budget: e.g. 5% back, or a free appetizer after 10 visits
task_market.ph_featured_dishes: e.g. Truffle Fries, Wagyu Burger, Matcha Tiramisu
task_market.ph_weekly_events: e.g. Happy Hour Mon–Fri 4–6 pm, Live Jazz on Friday, Weekend Brunch special
task_market.ph_restaurant_desc: e.g. We're a family-owned Japanese ramen shop serving rich tonkotsu and spicy miso broths made from scratch...
task_market.ph_specialties: e.g. 18-hour bone broth, handmade noodles, late-night hours, vegan options
task_market.ph_neighborhood: e.g. Koreatown, near Wilshire/Vermont Metro, surrounded by offices and apartments
task_market.ph_new_dishes: e.g. Summer uni pasta, matcha crème brûlée, returning seasonal short rib
task_market.ph_events_month: e.g. Sake pairing dinner on the 18th, Mother's Day brunch on the 12th, 20% off Tuesdays
task_market.ph_story_content: e.g. Our head chef just returned from a trip to Osaka and brought back 3 new techniques...
task_market.ph_address: e.g. 1234 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028
task_market.field_key_points: Key selling points (what makes you special)
task_market.ph_key_points: e.g. Only yakitori omakase in the Valley, open until 2 am on weekends, all-natural charcoal grill imported from Japan
task_market.ph_time_slot: e.g. Mon–Fri 3–6 pm, or All day Tuesday
task_market.ph_team_size_roles: e.g. 2 managers, 4 full-time servers, 3 part-time servers, 2 cooks, 1 dishwasher
task_market.desc_team_size_roles: List each role and how many people fill it.
task_market.ph_operating_hours: e.g. Mon–Thu 11 am–10 pm, Fri–Sun 10 am–11 pm
task_market.ph_peak_hours: e.g. Fri–Sat dinner (6–9 pm), Sunday brunch (10 am–1 pm)
task_market.ph_staff_roles: e.g. Manager, Server, Bartender, Line Cook, Dishwasher, Host
task_market.ph_city_county: e.g. Los Angeles, Orange County, San Diego
task_market.ph_previous_issues: e.g. Temperature log not maintained, improper raw meat storage, no sanitizer test strips available...
task_market.ph_monthly_volume: e.g. ~$8,000/month, or 200 lbs beef, 150 lbs chicken, 80 lbs fish
task_market.field_original_recipe: Original recipe (ingredient + quantity, one per line)
task_market.ph_original_recipe:
All-purpose flour, 2 cups
Butter, 4 oz
Eggs, 3
Salt, 1 tsp
...
task_market.desc_original_recipe: Include the original portion yield so the AI can calculate the ratio.
task_market.field_menu_with_ingredients: Your menu with main ingredients (one dish per line or section)
task_market.ph_menu_with_ingredients:
Caesar Salad — romaine, parmesan, croutons, anchovy dressing
Pad Thai — rice noodles, shrimp, eggs, peanuts, bean sprouts
...
task_market.desc_menu_with_ingredients: The more ingredient detail you provide, the more accurate the audit.
task_market.field_staff_to_feed: Number of staff to feed per day
task_market.ph_available_ingredients: e.g. Chicken backs, vegetable trimmings, day-old bread, eggs, rice, pasta, seasonal vegetables from prep...
task_market.ph_dish_list:
Seared Duck Breast — with cherry gastrique and root vegetable puree
Burrata Toast — heirloom tomato, basil oil
Pan-Seared Halibut
...
task_market.desc_dish_list: You can include a short note about the dish or just the name — the AI will work with either.
task_market.ph_comparable_rents: e.g. $6.50/sq ft nearby on Yelp review, or leave blank
task_market.field_pain_points: Top pain points with your current setup
task_market.ph_pain_points: e.g. Slow hardware, no delivery integration, poor reporting, high processing fees...
task_market.ph_team_composition: e.g. 1 manager, 3 full-time servers, 2 part-time servers, 2 line cooks, 1 prep cook, 1 dishwasher
task_market.ph_product_category: e.g. Produce, Meat & poultry, Seafood, Dry goods, Beverages
task_market.ph_current_supplier_info:
Supplier A (FreshCo): Chicken breast $3.40/lb, ground beef $4.10/lb
Supplier B (US Foods): Romaine $1.80/head, avocado $0.95 each
...
task_market.desc_current_supplier_info: List as many items as you want — the more detail, the bigger the savings analysis.
task_market.ph_monthly_volume_supplier: e.g. ~$6,000/month or 300 lbs chicken, 200 lbs beef
task_market.ph_restaurant_address: e.g. Koreatown, Los Angeles, CA — near Wilshire/Vermont
task_market.ph_cuisine_type_specific: e.g. Modern Korean BBQ, Authentic Sichuan, California-Mexican fusion
task_market.ph_current_customer_profile: e.g. Mostly young professionals age 25–35, lunch crowd, weekend families
task_market.ph_kitchen_capacity: e.g. One commercial oven, 6-burner range, prep kitchen open 9am–11pm. Currently at ~70% capacity on Friday dinner.
task_market.task_labor_compliance_short: Current CA minimum wage, compliance checklist & accountant summary.
task_market.task_labor_compliance_desc: Enter your restaurant headcount and whether you employ tipped workers. The AI returns a complete compliance report covering current California minimum wage rates, affected employees, a step-by-step checklist, and a concise summary to hand your accountant.
task_market.task_employee_handbook_short: A full CA-compliant employee handbook with attendance, dress code, and tip policies.
task_market.task_employee_handbook_desc: Enter your restaurant name, size, and service type. The AI generates a comprehensive California-compliant employee handbook covering every essential policy — ready to hand to new hires.
task_market.task_job_description_short: Ready-to-post hiring copy optimized for Indeed and Craigslist.
task_market.task_job_description_desc: Enter the job title, key responsibilities, and salary range. The AI writes a polished, ready-to-publish job description that attracts quality applicants on Indeed and Craigslist.
task_market.task_disciplinary_warning_short: Formal CA-compliant written warning — printable and ready to sign.
task_market.task_disciplinary_warning_desc: Enter the employee name, what happened, and whether there are prior warnings. The AI drafts a formal, California-compliant disciplinary letter with an employee acknowledgment block.
task_market.task_termination_checklist_short: Every CA legal step for offboarding — final pay, COBRA, notices, and property return.
task_market.task_termination_checklist_desc: Select the termination type and employee classification. The AI outputs a complete California termination checklist: final paycheck deadlines, COBRA notice window, unemployment notice, property return, and more — with CA Labor Code citations.
task_market.task_onboarding_schedule_short: Two-week day-by-day training plan with tasks, trainers, and learning goals.
task_market.task_onboarding_schedule_desc: Enter the new hire's position, department, and start date. The AI generates a structured 14-day onboarding plan — with daily training topics, responsible trainers, and clear learning objectives.
task_market.task_food_cost_benchmark_short: Compare your food cost % against LA restaurant averages and get specific savings ideas.
task_market.task_food_cost_benchmark_desc: Paste your current food cost percentage and monthly revenue range. The AI benchmarks you against similar LA restaurants, calculates the dollar gap, and delivers at least 5 targeted cost-reduction moves you can action this week.
task_market.task_break_even_short: Daily covers and revenue needed to break even — with exact numbers.
task_market.task_break_even_desc: Enter your monthly rent, labor cost, food cost percentage, and average check size. The AI calculates your break-even revenue per day and how many table covers you need to hit it.
task_market.task_catering_quote_short: Full quote with per-person cost, profit margin, and contract terms.
task_market.task_catering_quote_desc: Enter the event headcount, menu style, and per-person budget. The AI generates a complete catering quote — food cost breakdown, recommended price, margin, staffing estimate, and suggested contract terms.
task_market.task_price_increase_short: Warm, honest price increase notice — ready for social media or in-restaurant posting.
task_market.task_price_increase_desc: Enter the price increase amount, the reasons behind it, and your restaurant's style. The AI writes two versions: a short one for social media and a longer one for signage or email.
task_market.task_dish_cost_card_short: Per-serving cost breakdown, recommended price, and margin assessment for any dish.
task_market.task_dish_cost_card_desc: List every ingredient and quantity in a dish. The AI calculates the exact cost per serving, recommends a menu price, and tells you whether your current price is on target — with specific suggestions if it isn't.
task_market.task_menu_engineering_short: Star / Plow Horse / Puzzle / Dog matrix for every dish — with pricing recommendations.
task_market.task_menu_engineering_desc: Paste your menu (dish name + price, one per line). The AI classifies every item using the classic Star/Plow Horse/Puzzle/Dog matrix, then recommends what to promote, reprice, and retire.
task_market.task_review_reply_short: 3 ready-to-post reply templates — short, medium, and long — for any negative review.
task_market.task_review_reply_desc: Paste a customer review and choose your preferred tone. The AI crafts three reply templates at different lengths so you can pick the one that fits the moment.
task_market.task_faq_generator_short: 15–20 Q&As organized by topic — ready for your website or Google Business.
task_market.task_faq_generator_desc: Tell the AI your restaurant type and the topic areas guests ask about most. It generates 15–20 polished FAQ pairs, organized into sections and ready to paste straight onto your website or Google Business profile.
task_market.task_complaint_email_short: Professional email reply — apology, explanation, and remedy — without groveling.
task_market.task_complaint_email_desc: Paste the customer's complaint and describe what actually happened on your side. The AI writes a professional, empathetic email response that acknowledges the issue, explains briefly, and offers a concrete remedy.
task_market.task_reservation_policy_short: Formal reservation & cancellation policy — ready for your website or to text guests.
task_market.task_reservation_policy_desc: Answer three quick questions about how you handle reservations and the AI writes a complete, professional policy — plus a shorter version you can include in reservation confirmation texts.
task_market.task_loyalty_program_short: A full points or stamp program with reward tiers, launch copy, and ROI estimate.
task_market.task_loyalty_program_desc: Enter your average check size, repeat-customer goal, and how much you're willing to give back. The AI designs a complete loyalty program — with earning rules, reward tiers, welcome bonus, sample launch copy, and a cost estimate.
task_market.task_social_media_pack_short: 7-day Instagram & Facebook calendar with captions, hashtags, and posting times.
task_market.task_social_media_pack_desc: Tell the AI your featured dishes and any events this week. It returns a full 7-day social calendar: post copy, hashtag sets, and optimal publishing times for Instagram and Facebook.
task_market.task_gbp_optimizer_short: Optimized 750-char Google Business description with keywords and category tips.
task_market.task_gbp_optimizer_desc: Describe your restaurant, its specialties, and the neighborhood. The AI writes an SEO-optimized Google Business description (under 750 characters), recommends categories and attributes to enable, and suggests 3 Google Posts ideas.
task_market.task_email_newsletter_short: Full email with 2 A/B subject lines, content sections, and a CTA — ready to send.
task_market.task_email_newsletter_desc: Tell the AI what's new this month — dishes, events, and any story worth sharing. It writes a complete email newsletter with two subject line options, all content sections, and a clear call-to-action.
task_market.task_grand_opening_short: Social media post, poster copy, local press release, and Google Business post — all in one.
task_market.task_grand_opening_desc: Enter your opening date, address, and what makes your restaurant special. The AI creates a complete multi-channel launch pack: a shareable social post, in-store poster copy, a local press release, and a Google Business post.
task_market.task_promo_designer_short: Full campaign with offer, timing, channel copy, ROI estimate, and success metrics.
task_market.task_promo_designer_desc: Enter your promotion time slot and business goal. The AI designs a complete campaign — specific offer structure, duration, ready-to-use copy for each channel, expected ROI, and metrics to track.
task_market.task_schedule_optimizer_short: Optimized weekly shift table, labor cost estimate, and overtime risk alerts.
task_market.task_schedule_optimizer_desc: Describe your team, operating hours, and busiest periods. The AI returns a full weekly schedule, calculates estimated labor costs per role, flags overtime risk, and suggests shifts to trim or add.
task_market.task_open_close_checklist_short: Role-by-role open/close checklists formatted for printing and wall posting.
task_market.task_open_close_checklist_desc: Tell the AI your restaurant type and which staff roles you have. It generates a complete set of opening and closing checklists organized by role — formatted with checkboxes, ready to print and post.
task_market.task_health_inspection_short: Inspector-perspective checklist with common deductions and corrective actions.
task_market.task_health_inspection_desc: Enter your city, restaurant type, and any issues flagged in your last inspection. The AI generates a thorough prep checklist organized by the actual categories health inspectors score — with common point deductions and how to fix them.
task_market.task_vendor_rfq_short: Professional request-for-quote document ready to send to suppliers.
task_market.task_vendor_rfq_desc: Enter the product categories you need to source and your estimated monthly volume. The AI writes a complete RFQ document — with specifications, vendor requirements, pricing format, payment terms, and evaluation criteria.
task_market.task_recipe_scaler_short: Scale any recipe to any number of portions — with smart unit conversions.
task_market.task_recipe_scaler_desc: Paste your original recipe with quantities and set your target portion count. The AI scales every ingredient, converts to practical units, and flags anything that doesn't scale linearly (like salt or leavening).
task_market.task_seasonal_menu_short: 8–12 seasonal dish ideas with descriptions, core ingredients, and cost estimates.
task_market.task_seasonal_menu_desc: Tell the AI your cuisine type, current season, and rough ingredient budget per dish. It returns a full seasonal menu proposal with creative dish names, menu-ready descriptions, core ingredients, estimated food cost, and suggested price.
task_market.task_allergen_audit_short: 8-allergen matrix for every dish + a compliant disclosure statement.
task_market.task_allergen_audit_desc: Paste your full menu with ingredients. The AI identifies all 8 major allergens per dish, builds a clear allergen matrix table, and writes a compliance-ready disclosure statement for your menus or website.
task_market.task_staff_meal_short: 5-day employee meal plan using kitchen trim — practical, tasty, and budget-conscious.
task_market.task_staff_meal_desc: Enter your team size, what's commonly available in the kitchen, and your daily budget per person. The AI creates 5 days of satisfying staff meals that use trim and leftover prep to minimize waste.
task_market.task_menu_description_short: Appetite-inspiring menu copy for every dish — in the style you choose.
task_market.task_menu_description_desc: Paste your dish names (with optional brief notes). The AI writes polished, appetite-inspiring 1-3 sentence descriptions in your preferred style — formal, warm, or upscale. Includes a style guide note for consistency.
task_market.task_lease_negotiation_short: Market-data-backed negotiation strategy with talking points and attorney checklist.
task_market.task_lease_negotiation_desc: Enter your current rent, lease expiration, and negotiation goal. The AI builds a complete lease negotiation brief: market rate benchmarking, your leverage points, specific concessions to request, a ready-to-use negotiation script, and a 12-point attorney review checklist.
task_market.task_pricing_formula_short: 4.8x pricing model + menu engineering matrix to set prices that hit your revenue target.
task_market.task_pricing_formula_desc: Enter your current numbers and the AI applies the 4.8x pricing formula to show you exactly where your prices should be. Includes a menu engineering matrix summary (Stars / Plow Horses / Puzzles / Dogs) and a 6-month revenue projection.
task_market.task_pos_vendor_short: Scored comparison of 10+ POS platforms with a recommendation and negotiation checklist.
task_market.task_pos_vendor_desc: Enter your current POS system, monthly cost, and pain points. The AI compares 10 leading restaurant POS platforms across 8 criteria — with a scored table, a clear recommendation, and a vendor negotiation checklist you can use immediately.
task_market.task_labor_utilization_short: Hour-by-hour efficiency report with overstaffing gaps and dollar-impact adjustments.
task_market.task_labor_utilization_desc: Describe your team, operating hours, and busiest periods. The AI produces an hour-by-hour labor utilization analysis, identifies overstaffed and understaffed windows, and ranks specific scheduling changes by dollar savings.
task_market.task_supplier_comparison_short: Side-by-side vendor price analysis, overpayment estimate, and a negotiation script.
task_market.task_supplier_comparison_desc: List your current supplier names and pricing. The AI benchmarks your costs against wholesale market rates, calculates your overpayment, suggests alternatives, and writes a negotiation script you can use on the next call.
task_market.task_local_acquisition_short: Hyper-local customer acquisition plan built on neighborhood demographics and foot-traffic data.
task_market.task_local_acquisition_desc: Enter your restaurant's neighborhood, cuisine type, and growth goal. The AI maps your trade area demographics, identifies the top 3 untapped customer segments, and delivers a channel-by-channel 90-day acquisition plan with a budget allocation and KPIs.
task_market.task_channel_expansion_short: 90-day expansion playbook for takeout or private dining — with revenue projections.
task_market.task_channel_expansion_desc: Enter your current revenue mix and the channel you want to grow. The AI produces a full expansion playbook: market opportunity, 90-day launch steps, pricing and packaging recommendations, required operational changes, and 6-month revenue projections.
